title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account. They've tried resetting their password multiple times but still...

title: Payment Failure on Checkout
description: User reports that the 'Complete Purchase' button spins indefinitely when using a Visa card.

title: Typo in Documentation
description: There is a misspelling in the API integration guide under the 'Authentication' section.

title: Feature Request: Dark Mode
description: Customer is requesting a native dark mode for the web dashboard to reduce eye strain.

title: Dashboard Not Loading
description: The main analytics dashboard returns a 500 error for this specific user account.

title: Broken Image Links
description: Several product images on the landing page are appearing as broken icons in Safari.

title: Export Data Hangs
description: Attempting to export a CSV of the last 30 days of logs causes the browser to freeze.

title: Bulk Upload Error
description: User is getting a 'Format Not Recognized' error when uploading a standard .xlsx file.

title: Mobile App Crashing
description: App crashes immediately upon opening on iOS 17.2. Affecting multiple users in the region.

title: API Rate Limit Question
description: Customer needs clarification on the specific rate limits for the /search endpoint.
